index.title: Cold Chain, Refrigerated Containers & Cold Storage Solutions in India | Crystal Group
index.description: Crystal Group provides advanced cold chain logistics, refrigerated containers, reefer trucks, and cold storage solutions across India. Trusted by pharma, dairy, seafood and FMCG brands for reliable temperature-controlled services.

about.title: About Crystal Group | India's Leading Cold Chain & Refrigeration Solutions Company
about.description: Crystal Group is a trusted cold chain solutions provider offering refrigerated containers, cold rooms, reefer trucks, and storage services across India. Over a decade of reliable service.

contact.title: Contact Crystal Group | Cold Chain & Refrigeration Solutions in India
contact.description: Get in touch with Crystal Group to discuss cold storage, reefer containers, or cold chain logistics solutions. Available across India with quick response support.

locations.title: Crystal Group Locations | Cold Storage & Container Network
locations.description: Find Crystal Group at our convenient locations in Mumbai, Kolkata, Bhubaneswar. Get directions, contact details, and hours of operation. Visit us today!

careers.title: Careers at Crystal Group | Join Our Team
careers.description: Explore job opportunities at Crystal Group — container manufacturing, cold chain, logistics & more. Grow your career with us.

store-reefer.title: Reefer / Refrigerated Containers | Crystal Group
store-reefer.description: We offer a variety of reefer containers for businesses needing cold chain solutions. Choose from various sizes and configurations to meet your specific needs.

store-blast-freezer.title: Blast Freezer Containers | Crystal Group
store-blast-freezer.description: Rapid-freezing freezer containers from +25°C to -40°C using high-velocity airflow — preserve freshness, texture & safety for food, pharma & biotech.

store-super-freezer.title: Super Freezer Containers | Crystal Group
store-super-freezer.description: Ultra-low temperature containers down to -70°C — energy-efficient, high insulation with alarm & backup power for biotech, pharma & seafood.

store-super-store.title: Super Store Reefer Containers | Crystal Group
store-super-store.description: Dual-bay refrigerated containers (-25°C to +25°C) with high insulation and remote monitoring — ideal for food, pharma & perishable goods.

store-iso-tank.title: ISO Tanks: Safe and Efficient Liquid Transport | Crystal Group
store-iso-tank.description: Discover our ISO tanks, the industry standard for transporting bulk liquids safely and efficiently. Explore our range of solutions and optimize your logistics.

store-amc.title: AMC & Spare Parts for Cold Chain Equipment | Crystal Group
store-amc.description: Get reliable AMC services and genuine spare parts for cold storage units, reefer trucks, and refrigerated containers with Crystal Group.

build-bts.title: Built-to-Suit Cold Storage Facilities | Crystal Group India
build-bts.description: Crystal Group provides custom-built cold chain facilities — efficient, scalable, and ready in 90 days. BTS design, build, operate, and maintain solutions.

solutions.title: End-to-End Cold Chain Solutions in India | Crystal Group
solutions.description: Crystal Group delivers complete cold chain solutions — infrastructure, cold storage, refrigerated transport, blast freezing and 3PL services across India.

impact.title: Cold Chain Case Studies & Results | Crystal Group India
impact.description: See how Crystal Group delivers: 40,000 sqft pharma warehouses, 3-city rollouts in 90 days, and certified facilities for food, pharma and FMCG brands.

move.title: Refrigerated Transport & Reefer Fleet Pan-India | Crystal Group
move.description: Dedicated reefer fleet for temperature-controlled FTL and PTL transport across India — reliable cold chain logistics for food, pharma and FMCG.

solve.title: Custom Cold Chain Solutions & Consulting | Crystal Group India
solve.description: Complex cold chain requirement? Crystal Group designs bespoke solutions — consulting, overflow capacity, and new market entry support across India.

build-epc.title: Cold Storage EPC Construction & Design | Crystal Group India
build-epc.description: Turnkey cold facility builds — engineering, procurement, construction and commissioning to GFSI and GMP food safety standards, pan-India.

process-bfs.title: Blast Freezing Services -40°C, 10 MT/day | Crystal Group India
process-bfs.description: FSSC 22000 blast freezing in Kolkata & Bhubaneswar — 10 MT/day at -40°C for seafood, meat, dairy and food manufacturers. Portable units also available.

process-fvp.title: Fruits & Vegetables Cold Chain Processing | Crystal Group India
process-fvp.description: Cut post-harvest losses with Crystal Group's F&V services — pre-cooling, sorting, grading, packing and cold storage from farm to retail in India.

store-3pl.title: 3PL Cold Chain & Supply Chain Management | Crystal Group India
store-3pl.description: Full cold supply chain outsourcing with WMS, ERP/SAP integration, order management and stock control. Trusted 3PL operator since 2000.

store-colds.title: Cold Storage & Warehousing Facilities Across India | Crystal Group
store-colds.description: FSSC 22000 certified cold warehouses in 9 cities — Kolkata, Chennai, JNPT, Delhi, Mundra & more. Four temperature zones, WMS-enabled, 100% power backup.

store-portable-cold-storage.title: Portable Cold Storage Containers: Rent or Buy | Crystal Group India
store-portable-cold-storage.description: Plug-and-play reefer, blast freezer (-40°C), super freezer (-70°C) and ISO tanks — pan-India delivery, rent or buy for food, pharma and cold chain needs.
